verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez: ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕጉ ፡ ለዘለምጽ ፡ በዕለተ ፡ ነጽሐ ፡ የሐውር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ካህን ።

translations.lxx: This is the law of the leper: in whatsoever day he shall have been cleansed, then shall he be brought to the priest.
translations.kjv: This shall be the law of the leper in the day of his cleansing: He shall be brought unto the priest:

verses.geez: ወይወፅእ ፡ ካህን ፡ አፍአ ፡ እምትዕይንት ፡ ወይሬእዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ኀደጎ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ለምጹ ፡ ለዘለምጽ ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall come forth out of the camp, and the priest shall look, and, behold, the plague of the leprosy is removed from the leper.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall go forth out of the camp; and the priest shall look, and, behold, if the plague of leprosy be healed in the leper;

verses.geez:
ወሐዊሮ ፡ ኀቤሁ ፡ ካህን ፡ ያመጽእ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዘነጽሐ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ደዋርሀ ፡ ሕያዋተ ፡ ወንጹሓተ ፡ [ወዕፀ ፡ ጽኍድ
                  ፡] ወለየ ፡ ክዑበ ፡ ወቈጽለ ፡ ህሶጱ ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall give directions, and they shall take for him that is cleansed two clean live birds, and cedar wood, and spun scarlet, and hyssop.
translations.kjv: Then shall the priest command to take for him that is to be cleansed two birds alive and clean, and cedar wood, and scarlet, and hyssop:

verses.geez: ወይኤዝዝ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወይጠብሕዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ዶርሆ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማይ ፡ ጥዑም ፡ ውስተ ፡ ንዋየ ፡ ልሕኵት ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall give direction, and they shall kill one bird over an earthen vessel over running water.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall command that one of the birds be killed in an earthen vessel over running water:

verses.geez:
ወያመጽእ ፡ ዕፀ ፡ ጽኍድ ፡ ወይነሥኣ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለእንታክቲ ፡ ዶርሆ ፡ እንተ ፡ ሕያውት ፡ ወያግዕዛ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም
                  ፡ ጠሚዖ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደማ ፡ ለእንታክቲ ፡ እንተ ፡ ጠብሑ ።

translations.lxx: And as for the living bird he shall take it, and the cedar wood, and the spun scarlet, and the hyssop, and he shall dip them and the living bird into the blood of the bird that was slain over running water.
translations.kjv: As for the living bird, he shall take it, and the cedar wood, and the scarlet, and the hyssop, and shall dip them and the living bird in the blood of the bird that was killed over the running water:

verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ ይጠምዕ ፡ ዝክተ ፡ ዕፀ ፡ ጽኍድ ፡ ወለየኒ ፡ ዘክዑብ ፡ ወቈጽለ ፡ ህሶጱ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደማ ፡ ለእንታክቲ ፡
                  ዶርሆ ፡ እንተ ፡ ጠብሑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማይ ፡ ጥዑም ፡ ወይነዝኆ ፡ ስብዕ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ዘነጽሐ ፡ ዘለምጽ ፡ ወንጹሐ ፡ ይከውን
                  ።

translations.lxx: And he shall sprinkle seven times upon him that was cleansed of his leprosy, and he shall be clean; and he shall let go the living bird into the field.
translations.kjv: And he shall sprinkle upon him that is to be cleansed from the leprosy seven times, and shall pronounce him clean, and shall let the living bird loose into the open field.

verses.geez:
ወየኀፅብ ፡ ኣልባሲሁ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዘነጽሐ ፡ ወይትላጸይ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ሥዕርቶ ፡ ወይትኀፀብ ፡ በማይ ፡ ወንጹሐ ፡ ይከውን ፡
                  ወ[እም]ዝ ፡ ይበውእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ወይነብር ፡ አፍአ ፡ እምቤቱ ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ መዋዕለ ።

translations.lxx: And the man that has been cleansed shall wash his garments, and shall shave off all his hair, and shall wash himself in water, and shall be clean; and after that he shall go into the camp, and shall remain out of his house seven days.
translations.kjv: And he that is to be cleansed shall wash his clothes, and shave off all his hair, and wash himself in water, that he may be clean: and after that he shall come into the camp, and shall tarry abroad out of his tent seven days.

verses.geez:
ወበሳብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ይትላጸይ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ሥዕርተ ፡ ርእሱ ፡ ወጽሕሞ ፡ ወኀንገዞ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ሥዕርቶ ፡ ይትላጸይ ፡
                  ወየኀፅብ ፡ አልባሲሁ ፡ ወሥጋሁኒ ፡ የኀፅብ ፡ በማይ ፡ ወንጹሐ ፡ ይከውን ።

translations.lxx: And it shall come to pass on the seventh day, he shall shave off all his hair, his head and his beard, and his eye-brows, even all his hair shall he shave; and he shall wash his garments, and wash his body with water, and shall be clean.
translations.kjv: But it shall be on the seventh day, that he shall shave all his hair off his head and his beard and his eyebrows, even all his hair he shall shave off: and he shall wash his clothes, also he shall wash his flesh in water, and he shall be clean.

verses.geez:
ወበሳ[ምን]ት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ያመጽእ ፡ ክልኤተ ፡ አባግዐ ፡ ንጹሓነ ፡ እለ ፡ ዓመት ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ወዓዲ ፡ አሐደ ፡ በግዐ ፡
                  ንጹሐ ፡ ዘዓመት ፡ ወሠለስተ ፡ መስፈርተ ፡ ስንዳሌ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ፡ ዘልውስ ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ወአሐደ ፡ ግምዔ ፡ ቅብእ ።

translations.lxx: And on the eighth day he shall take two lambs without spot of a year old, and one ewe lamb without spot of a year old, and three-tenths of fine flour for sacrifice kneaded with oil, and one small cup of oil.
translations.kjv: And on the eighth day he shall take two he lambs without blemish, and one ewe lamb of the first year without blemish, and three tenth deals of fine flour for a meat offering, mingled with oil, and one log of oil.

verses.geez:
ወያቀውም ፡ ካህን ፡ ዘያነጽሖ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ዘነጽሐ ፡ ወዝንቱኒ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡
                  ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ።

translations.lxx: And the priest that cleanses shall present the man under purification, and these offerings before the Lord, at the door of the tabernacle of witness.
translations.kjv: And the priest that maketh him clean shall present the man that is to be made clean, and those things, before the LORD, at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation:

verses.geez:
ወይነሥእ ፡ ካህን ፡ አሐደ ፡ በግዐ ፡ ወያበውኦ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ንስሓ ፡ ወውእተሃ ፡ ግምዔ ፡ ቅብእ ፡ ወይፈልጦሙ ፡
                  ፍልጣነ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall take one lamb, and offer him for a trespass-offering, and the cup of oil, and set them apart for a special offering before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall take one he lamb, and offer him for a trespass offering, and the log of oil, and wave them for a wave offering before the LORD:

verses.geez:
ወይጠብሕዎ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መካን ፡ ኀበ ፡ ይጠብሑ ፡ ዘመሥዋዕት ፡ ወዘበእንተ ፡ ኀጢአትኒ ፡ በመካን ፡
                  ቅዱስ ፡ እስመ ፡ ዘበእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ከመ ፡ ዘንስሓ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ለካህን ፡ ቅዱስ ፡ ለቅዱሳን ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And they shall kill the lamb in the place where they kill the whole-burnt-offerings, and the sin-offerings, in the holy places; for it is a sin-offering: as the trespass-offering, it belongs to the priest, it is most holy.
translations.kjv: And he shall slay the lamb in the place where he shall kill the sin offering and the burnt offering, in the holy place: for as the sin offering is the priest’s, so is the trespass offering: it is most holy:

verses.geez:
ወይነሥእ ፡ ካህን ፡ እምነ ፡ ደም ፡ ዘንስሓ ፡ ወይወዲ ፡ ካህን ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዝኑ ፡ እንተ ፡ የማን ፡ ለዘ ፡ ነጽሐ ፡
                  ወውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ እግሩ ፡ እንተ ፡ የማን ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall take of the blood of the trespass-offering, and the priest shall put it on the tip of the right ear of the person under cleansing, and on the thumb of his right hand, and on the great toe of his right foot.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall take some of the blood of the trespass offering, and the priest shall put it upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot:

verses.geez: ወይነሥእ ፡ ካህን ፡ እምነ ፡ ቅብእ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ግምዔ ፡ ወይሰውጥ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ እንተ ፡ ፀጋም ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall take of the cup of oil, and shall pour it upon his own left hand.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall take some of the log of oil, and pour it into the palm of his own left hand:

verses.geez:
ወይይጠምዕ ፡ ካህን ፡ አጽባዕቶ ፡ እንተ ፡ የማን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ቅብእ ፡ ዘሀለወ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ እንተ ፡
                  ፀጋም ፡ ወይነዝኅ ፡ እምውእቱ ፡ ቅብእ ፡ ስብዕ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And he shall dip with the finger of his right hand into some of the oil that is in his left hand, and he shall sprinkle with his finger seven times before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall dip his right finger in the oil that is in his left hand, and shall sprinkle of the oil with his finger seven times before the LORD:

verses.geez:
ወዘተረፈሰ ፡ ቅብእ ፡ ዘሀሎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ይወድዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ እዝኑ ፡ እንተ ፡ የማን ፡
                  ለውእቱ ፡ ዘነጽሐ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ እንተ ፡ የማን ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ እግሩ ፡ እንተ ፡ የማን ፡ በመካነ ፡
                  ደም ፡ ዘንስሓ ።

translations.lxx: And the remaining oil that is in his hand, the priest shall put on the tip of the right ear of him that is under cleansing, and on the thumb of his right hand, and on the great toe of his right foot, on the place of the blood of the trespass-offering.
translations.kjv: And of the rest of the oil that is in his hand shall the priest put upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot, upon the blood of the trespass offering:

verses.geez:
ወዘተርፈ ፡ ቅብእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ለካህን ፡ ይወድዮ ፡ ካህን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርእሱ ፡ ለዘነጽሐ ፡ ወያስተሰሪ ፡ ሎቱ ፡
                  ካህን ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And the remaining oil that is on the hand of the priest, the priest shall put on the head of the cleansed leper, and the priest shall make atonement for him before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the remnant of the oil that is in the priest’s hand he shall pour upon the head of him that is to be cleansed: and the priest shall make an atonement for him before the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወይገብር ፡ ካህን ፡ ዘበእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ወያስተሰሪ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ዘነጽሐ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአቱ ፡
                  ወእምዝ ፡ ይጠብሕ ፡ ካህን ፡ ዘመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall sacrifice the sin-offering, and the priest shall make atonement for the person under purification to cleanse him from his sin, and afterwards the priest shall slay the whole-burnt-offering.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall offer the sin offering, and make an atonement for him that is to be cleansed from his uncleanness; and afterward he shall kill the burnt offering:

verses.geez:
ወያበውእ ፡ ካህን ፡ ዘመሥዋዕትኒ ፡ ወዘቍርባንኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወያስተሰሪ ፡ ሎቱ ፡
                  ካህን ፡ ወይነጽሕ ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall offer the whole-burnt-offering, and the sacrifice upon the altar before the Lord; and the priest shall make atonement for him, and he shall be cleansed.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall offer the burnt offering and the meat offering upon the altar: and the priest shall make an atonement for him, and he shall be clean.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ ነዳይ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ያመጽእ ፡ ማሕስአ ፡ በግዕ ፡ አሐደ ፡ ዘይፈልጡ ፡ በእንተ ፡
                  ንስሓ ፡ በዘ ፡ ያስተሰርዩ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ወአሐቲ ፡ በመስፈርተ ፡ ስንዳሌ ፡ ዘልውስ ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ፡ ወአሐደ ፡ ግምዔ
                  ፡ ቅብእ ፤

translations.lxx: And if he should be poor, and cannot afford so much, he shall take one lamb for his transgression for a separate-offering, so as to make propitiation for him, and a tenth deal of fine flour mingled with oil for a sacrifice, and one cup of oil,
translations.kjv: And if he be poor, and cannot get so much; then he shall take one lamb for a trespass offering to be waved, to make an atonement for him, and one tenth deal of fine flour mingled with oil for a meat offering, and a log of oil;

verses.geez:
ወክልኤተ ፡ መዓንቀ ፡ አው ፡ ክልኤተ ፡ እጕለ ፡ ርግብ ፡ በዘቦ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ወትኩን ፡ አሐቲ ፡ በእንተ ፡
                  ኀጢአት ፡ ወአሐቲ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ።

translations.lxx: and two turtle-doves, or two young pigeons, as he can afford; and the one shall be for a sin-offering, and the other for a whole-burnt-offering.
translations.kjv: And two turtledoves, or two young pigeons, such as he is able to get; and the one shall be a sin offering, and the other a burnt offering.

verses.geez:
ወያበውኦን ፡ በሰምንት ፡ ዕለት ፡ በዘያነጽሕዎ ፡ ወይወስድ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ካህን ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡
                  ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And he shall bring them on the eighth day, to purify him, to the priest, to the door of the tabernacle of witness before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And he shall bring them on the eighth day for his cleansing unto the priest, unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, before the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወይነሥኦ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ዘንስሓ ፡ ወውእቱ ፡ ግምዔ ፡ ቅብእ ፡ ወያነብሮ ፡ ቍርባነ ፡ ቅድመ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall take the lamb of the trespass-offering, and the cup of oil, and place them for a set-offering before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall take the lamb of the trespass offering, and the log of oil, and the priest shall wave them for a wave offering before the LORD:

verses.geez:
ወይጠብሖ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ዘንስሓ ፡ ወይነሥእ ፡ ካህን ፡ እምነ ፡ ደሙ ፡ ለዘንስሓ ፡ ወይወዲ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡
                  እዝኑ ፡ እንተ ፡ የማን ፡ ለዘ ፡ ነጽሐ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ እንተ ፡ የማን ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ እግሩ ፡ እንተ
                  ፡ የማን ።

translations.lxx: And he shall slay the lamb of the trespass-offering; and the priest shall take of the blood of the trespass-offering, and put it on the tip of the right ear of him that is under purification, and on the thumb of his right hand, and on the great toe of his right foot.
translations.kjv: And he shall kill the lamb of the trespass offering, and the priest shall take some of the blood of the trespass offering, and put it upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot:

verses.geez: ወይሰውጥ ፡ እምውእቱ ፡ ቅብእ ፡ ካህን ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ እንተ ፡ ጸጋም ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall pour of the oil on his own left hand.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall pour of the oil into the palm of his own left hand:

verses.geez:
ወይነዝኅ ፡ ካህን ፡ በአጽባዕቱ ፡ እንተ ፡ የማን ፡ እምነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ቅብእ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ እንተ ፡ ጸጋም ፡
                  ስብዕ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall sprinkle with the finger of his right hand some of the oil that is in his left hand seven times before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall sprinkle with his right finger some of the oil that is in his left hand seven times before the LORD:

verses.geez:
ወእምነ ፡ ውእቱኒ ፡ ቅብእ ፡ ዘሀለወ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ለካህን ፡ ይወዲ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ እዝኑ ፡ እንተ ፡ የማን
                  ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ዘነጽሐ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ እንተ ፡ የማን ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ከተማ ፡ እግሩ ፡ እንተ ፡ የማን ፡ በመካነ
                  ፡ ደሙ ፡ ለዘ ፡ [ንስሓ] ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall put of the oil that is on his hand on the tip of the right ear of him that is under purification, and on the thumb of his right hand, and on the great toe of his right foot, on the place of the blood of the trespass-offering.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall put of the oil that is in his hand upon the tip of the right ear of him that is to be cleansed, and upon the thumb of his right hand, and upon the great toe of his right foot, upon the place of the blood of the trespass offering:

verses.geez:
ወዘተረፈሰ ፡ ቅብእ ፡ እምነ ፡ ዘሀለወ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ለካህን ፡ ይወድዮ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርእሱ ፡ ለዘ ፡ ነጽሐ ፡
                  ወያስተሰሪ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ካህን ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And that which is left of the oil which is on the hand of the priest he shall put on the head of him that is purged, and the priest shall make atonement for him before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the rest of the oil that is in the priest’s hand he shall put upon the head of him that is to be cleansed, to make an atonement for him before the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወይገብር ፡ አሐተ ፡ እምነ ፡ ውእቶን ፡ መዓንቅ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ እምነ ፡ እጕለ ፡ ርግብ ፡ እምነ ፡ ዘቦ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ
                  ፤

translations.lxx: And he shall offer one of the turtle-doves or of the young pigeons, as he can afford it,
translations.kjv: And he shall offer the one of the turtledoves, or of the young pigeons, such as he can get;

verses.geez:
አሐቲ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ወአሐቲ ፡ ለቍርባን ፡ ምስለ ፡ መሥዋዕት ፡ ወያስተሰሪ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለውእቱ ፡
                  ዘነጽሐ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: the one for a sin-offering, the other for a whole-burnt-offering with the meat-offering, and the priest shall make an atonement before the Lord for him that is under purification.
translations.kjv: Even such as he is able to get, the one for a sin offering, and the other for a burnt offering, with the meat offering: and the priest shall make an atonement for him that is to be cleansed before the LORD.

verses.geez: ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕጉ ፡ ለዘወፅአ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ወለዘ ፡ አልቦኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ በዘያነጽሕዎ ።

translations.lxx: This is the law for him in whom is the plague of leprosy, and who cannot afford the offerings for his purification.
translations.kjv: This is the law of him in whom is the plague of leprosy, whose hand is not able to get that which pertaineth to his cleansing.

verses.geez: ወነበቦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወለአሮን ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying,

verses.geez:
እምከመ ፡ ቦእክሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ እንተ ፡ እሁበክሙ ፡ አነ ፡ ትትዋረስዋ ፡ ወእፌኑ ፡ ትእምርተ ፡ ለምጽ
                  ፡ ውስተ ፡ አብያታ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ታጠርዩ ፤

translations.lxx: Whensoever ye shall enter into the land of the Chananites, which I give you for a possession, and I shall put the plague of leprosy in the houses of the land of your possession;
translations.kjv: When ye be come into the land of Canaan, which I give to you for a possession, and I put the plague of leprosy in a house of the land of your possession;

verses.geez:
ወእመቦ ፡ ለዘወፅአ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤቱ ፡ ይንግሮ ፡ ለካህን ፡ ወይብል ፡ ከመ ፡ ትእምርተ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ርኢኩ ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  ቤትየ ።

translations.lxx: then the owner of the house shall come and report to the priest, saying, I have seen as it were a plague in the house.
translations.kjv: And he that owneth the house shall come and tell the priest, saying, It seemeth to me there is as it were a plague in the house:

verses.geez:
ወይኤዝዝ ፡ ካህን ፡ ያፍልሱ ፡ ንዋዮ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ እንበለ ፡ ይባእ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለርእዮታ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ትእምርተ
                  ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ወኢይረኵስ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘሀለወ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ ወእምዝ ፡ ይበውእ ፡ ካህን ፡ ይርአዮ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ቤት
                  ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall give orders to remove the furniture of the house, before the priest comes in to see the plague, and thus none of the things in the house shall become unclean; and afterwards the priest shall go in to examine the house.
translations.kjv: Then the priest shall command that they empty the house, before the priest go into it to see the plague, that all that is in the house be not made unclean: and afterward the priest shall go in to see the house:

verses.geez:
ወይሬእያ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ትእምርተ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ሀለወት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ትእምርተ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አረፍቱ
                  ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ እመኒ ፡ ታኅመለምል ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ታቅየሐይሕ ፡ ወርእየታኒ ፡ የአኪ ፡ እምነ ፡ አረፍት ።

translations.lxx: And he shall look on the plague, and, behold, if the plague is in the walls of the house, he will see greenish or reddish cavities, and the appearance of them will be beneath the surface of the walls.
translations.kjv: And he shall look on the plague, and, behold, if the plague be in the walls of the house with hollow strakes, greenish or reddish, which in sight are lower than the wall;

verses.geez: [ወ]ወፂኦ ፡ ካህን ፡ እምነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ በኀበ ፡ ኆኅት ፡ ያጸንሖ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለት ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall come out of the house to the door of the house, and the priest shall separate the house seven days.
translations.kjv: Then the priest shall go out of the house to the door of the house, and shut up the house seven days:

verses.geez:
ወይመጽእ ፡ ካህን ፡ በሳብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወይሬእዮ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ተዘርወት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  አረፍቱ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ቤት ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall return on the seventh day and view the house; and, behold, if the plague is spread in the walls of the house,
translations.kjv: And the priest shall come again the seventh day, and shall look: and, behold, if the plague be spread in the walls of the house;

verses.geez:
ወይኤዝዝ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወያወፅኡ ፡ እበኒሁ ፡ ዘኀበ ፡ ሀለወት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ትእምርተ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ወያወፅእዎ ፡ አፍአ ፡
                  እምነ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ውስተ ፡ መካን ፡ ርኩስ ።

translations.lxx: then the priest shall give orders, and they shall take away the stones in which the plague is, and shall cast them out of the city into an unclean place.
translations.kjv: Then the priest shall command that they take away the stones in which the plague is, and they shall cast them into an unclean place without the city:

verses.geez:
ወያመጽኡ ፡ ካልአ ፡ እብነ ፡ ውቁረ ፡ ወይወድዩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መካኖን ፡ ለውእቶን ፡ እበን ፡ ወያመጽኡ ፡ ካልአ ፡ መሬተ
                  ፡ ወይመርግዎ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ቤት ።

translations.lxx: And they shall take other scraped stones, and put them in the place of the former stones, and they shall take other plaster and plaster the house.
translations.kjv: And they shall take other stones, and put them in the place of those stones; and he shall take other morter, and shall plaister the house.

verses.geez:
ወለእመሰ ፡ ገብአት ፡ ካዕበ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ወወፅአ[ት] ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ አውፅኡ ፡ እበኒሁ
                  ፡ ወእምድኅረ ፡ ገስገስዎ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ ወእምድኅረ ፡ መረግዎ ፤

translations.lxx: And if the plague should return again, and break out in the house after they have taken away the stones and after the house is scraped, and after it has been plastered,
translations.kjv: And if the plague come again, and break out in the house, after that he hath taken away the stones, and after he hath scraped the house, and after it is plaistered;

verses.geez:
ወይበውእ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወይሬኢ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ተዘርወት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ዘውእቱ ፡ ቤ[ት] ፡ ለምጽ ፡ እንተ ፡ ኢተኀድግ
                  ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ ወርኩስ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: then the priest shall go in and see if the plague is spread in the house: it is a confirmed leprosy in the house, it is unclean.
translations.kjv: Then the priest shall come and look, and, behold, if the plague be spread in the house, it is a fretting leprosy in the house: it is unclean.

verses.geez:
ወይነሥትዎ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ ዕፀዊሁተኒ ፡ ወእበኒሁኒ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ መሬቶ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ ይክዕዉ ፡ አፍአ ፡
                  እምሀገር ፡ ውስተ ፡ መካን ፡ ርኩስ ።

translations.lxx: And they shall take down the house, and its timbers and its stones, and they shall carry out all the mortar without the city into an unclean place.
translations.kjv: And he shall break down the house, the stones of it, and the timber thereof, and all the morter of the house; and he shall carry them forth out of the city into an unclean place.

verses.geez: ወዘቦአ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ በኵሉ ፡ መዋዕል ፡ እምዘ ፡ አዕለልዎ ፡ ርኩስ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እስከ ፡ ሰርክ ።

translations.lxx: And he that goes into the house at any time, during its separation, shall be unclean until evening.
translations.kjv: Moreover he that goeth into the house all the while that it is shut up shall be unclean until the even.

verses.geez: ወዘቤተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ የኀፅብ ፡ አልባሲሁ ፡ ወዘበልዐ ፡ በውእቱ ፡ የኀፅብ ፡ አልባሲሁ ።

translations.lxx: And he that sleeps in the house shall wash his garments, and be unclean until evening; and he that eats in the house shall wash his garments, and be unclean until evening.
translations.kjv: And he that lieth in the house shall wash his clothes; and he that eateth in the house shall wash his clothes.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ መጽአ ፡ ካህን ፡ ወቦአ ፡ ወርእየ ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ኢተዘርወት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡
                  እምድኅረ ፡ መረግዎ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ያነጽሖ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ እስመ ፡ ኀደገቶ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ሕብር ።

translations.lxx: And if the priest shall arrive and enter and see, and behold the plague be not at all spread in the house after the house has been plastered, then the priest shall declare the house clean, because the plague is healed.
translations.kjv: And if the priest shall come in, and look upon it, and, behold, the plague hath not spread in the house, after the house was plaistered: then the priest shall pronounce the house clean, because the plague is healed.

verses.geez: ወይነሥእ ፡ በዘ ፡ ያነጽሖ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ ፪ደዋርሀ ፡ ወዕፀ ፡ ጽኍድ ፡ ወለየ ፡ ክዑበ ፡ ወቈጽለ ፡ ህሶጱ ።

translations.lxx: And he shall take to purify the house two clean living birds, and cedar wood, and spun scarlet, and hyssop.
translations.kjv: And he shall take to cleanse the house two birds, and cedar wood, and scarlet, and hyssop:

verses.geez: ወይጠብሕ ፡ አሐተ ፡ እምውእቶን ፡ ደዋርህ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ንዋየ ፡ ልሕኵት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማየ ፡ ጥዑም ።

translations.lxx: And he shall slay one bird in an earthen vessel over running water.
translations.kjv: And he shall kill the one of the birds in an earthen vessel over running water:

verses.geez:
ወይነሥእ ፡ ዝክተ ፡ ዕፀ ፡ ጽኍድ ፡ ወለየ ፡ ክዑበ ፡ ወቈጽለ ፡ ህሶጱ ፡ ወዶርሆ ፡ እንተ ፡ ሕያውት ፡ ወይጠምዖ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ደመ ፡ ዶርሆ ፡ እንተ ፡ ጠብሑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማየ ፡ ጥዑም ፡ ወይነዝኆ ፡ ቦሙ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ ስብዕ ።

translations.lxx: And he shall take the cedar wood, and the spun scarlet, and the hyssop, and the living bird; and shall dip it into the blood of the bird slain over running water, and with them he shall sprinkle the house seven times.
translations.kjv: And he shall take the cedar wood, and the hyssop, and the scarlet, and the living bird, and dip them in the blood of the slain bird, and in the running water, and sprinkle the house seven times:

verses.geez:
ወያነጽሖ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ በደማ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ዶርሆ ፡ ወበማየ ፡ ጥዑም ፡ ወበዶርሆ ፡ እንተ ፡ ሕያውት ፡ ወበውእቱ
                  ፡ ዕፀ ፡ ጽኍድ ፡ ወበቈጽለ ፡ ህሶጱ ፡ ወበለይ ፡ ክዑብ ።

translations.lxx: And he shall purify the house with the blood of the bird, and with the running water, and with the living bird, and with the cedar wood, and with the hyssop, and with the spun scarlet.
translations.kjv: And he shall cleanse the house with the blood of the bird, and with the running water, and with the living bird, and with the cedar wood, and with the hyssop, and with the scarlet:

verses.geez:
ወይፌንዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ዶርሆ ፡ እንተ ፡ ሕያውት ፡ አፍአ ፡ እምሀገር ፡ ወያግዕዛ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ወያስተሰሪ ፡
                  በእንተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ቤት ፡ ወይነጽሕ ፡ ቤቱ ።

translations.lxx: And he shall let the living bird go out of the city into the field, and shall make atonement for the house, and it shall be clean.
translations.kjv: But he shall let go the living bird out of the city into the open fields, and make an atonement for the house: and it shall be clean.

verses.geez: ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕጉ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ትእምርተ ፡ ለምጽ ፡ ወለሕብሩ ፤

translations.lxx: This is the law concerning every plague of leprosy and scurf,
translations.kjv: This is the law for all manner of plague of leprosy, and scall,

verses.geez: ለለምጸ ፡ ልብስኒ ፡ ወለቤትኒ ፤

translations.lxx: and of the leprosy of a garment, and of a house,
translations.kjv: And for the leprosy of a garment, and of a house,

verses.geez: ወዘትእምርተ ፡ ርምየትኒ ፡ ወዘሕንብርብሬኒ ፤

translations.lxx: and of a sore, and of a clear spot, and of a shining one,
translations.kjv: And for a rising, and for a scab, and for a bright spot:

verses.geez: በዘ ፡ ታአምሩ ፡ እመ ፡ ርኩስ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወእመ ፡ ንጹሕ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ሕጉ ፡ ለለምጽ ።

translations.lxx: and of declaring in what day it is unclean, and in what day it shall be purged: this is the law of the leprosy.
translations.kjv: To teach when it is unclean, and when it is clean: this is the law of leprosy.
